methodology_description.text: Government expenditure analysis uses both economic classification (compensation, goods/services, interest, transfers) and functional classification (COFOG). COFOG data available for EU countries via Eurostat.

methodology_summary: Disaggregated Expenditure Panel: Government expenditure disaggregated by category from World Bank WDI. Source: World Bank WDI. Construction: direct. Coverage: global_205, 1972-2024.
